note: Headless draw-call benchmark at player spawn (map centre), measured per-frame over 120 frames via scripts/bench.mjs. Run under SwiftShader (software WebGL) so FPS is not meaningful here; draw calls / triangles / geometries are the deterministic, hardware-independent metrics.

delta.explanation: Most frames skip the shadow pass (on-demand shadow map); the colour pass is ~300 calls. Refresh frames (~964) happen every 3rd frame for animated-caster shadow updates and on player recenter; they shrink further as the player explores away from the map centre because the follow frustum then covers fewer casters.
